landing.headline: Your Bridge to
landing.subline: Discover welfare schemes you qualify for. File and track civic complaints with full transparency, SLA guarantees, and AI assistance.
landing.problemSub: Delhi provides hundreds of services, but most citizens never know they exist — or give up when complaints disappear.
landing.stat1Desc: Millions of eligible citizens miss out on housing, education, and food subsidies simply because discovery is broken.
landing.stat1Footer: Real person affected: 4.2 crore Delhi residents
landing.stat2Label: of civic complaints receive no update within 30 days
landing.stat2Desc: Potholes, water supply, garbage — complaints are filed and forgotten. Citizens have no way to know if anyone is working on it.
landing.stat2Footer: ₹840 Cr spent on complaint systems with <32% resolution rate
landing.howItWorksSub: Three simple steps to access your civic rights and resolve community issues.
landing.step1Desc: Use our AI assistant or browse categories to find welfare schemes you are eligible for.
landing.step2Desc: Submit your complaint or scheme application directly with verified OTP authentication.
landing.step3Desc: Monitor real-time status with SLA countdowns. Automatic escalation if deadlines are missed.
landing.feat1Desc: Stop guessing what you qualify for. Our smart filter system matches your demographics to active welfare schemes instantly.
landing.feat2Desc: Never wonder if your voice was heard. Our system forces accountability through mandatory deadlines and auto-escalation.
landing.feat3Desc: Navigating administrative services shouldn't require a law degree. Ask our AI questions in plain English or Hindi.
landing.feat1Bullet1: Filter by income, caste, and location
landing.feat2Bullet2: Live SLA Countdown Timers per complaint
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to make your voice heard?
landing.ctaSub: Join thousands of Delhi citizens building a better city.
landing.mockAiQuery: How do I apply for the Ladli scheme?
landing.mockAiInput: Type a message in English or Hindi...
landing.rolesSub: From daily commuters to city planners, NyayaSetu provides tailored tools for everyone.
landing.roleCitizenDesc: File complaints, discover schemes, and track progress without visiting any civic department.
landing.roleOfficerDesc: Manage assigned complaints in your ward, post photo updates, and mark issues as resolved efficiently.
landing.roleSupervisorDesc: Monitor departmental SLAs, view aggregated analytics, and handle escalations from field officers.
landing.mockScheme1Elig: Eligible: Annual income < ₹3L, No owned house
landing.mockScheme2Elig: Eligible: BPL family, Delhi resident > 3 years

about.title: About NyayaSetu
about.subtitle: A civic tech prototype aimed at bridging the gap between the citizens of Delhi and the municipal services they rely on.
about.problemDesc1: Delhi's municipal apparatus offers hundreds of schemes and services, but the system is often opaque. Citizens face two major challenges:
about.problemLi1: Scheme Information Asymmetry: Welfare funds go unutilized because the people who need them most don't know they exist or don't know if they qualify.
about.problemLi2: The Complaint Black Hole: Reporting a pothole or a broken streetlight often feels like shouting into the void. Without strict deadlines or transparency, complaints are easily ignored.
about.solutionDesc1: NyayaSetu ("Bridge of Justice") tackles these issues directly through a dual-engine platform:
about.solution1Desc: Instead of making citizens search for schemes, our rule-based engine matches citizen profiles (age, gender, category, occupation) against active schemes, telling them exactly why they qualify.
about.solution2Desc: Every submitted complaint comes with a strict Service Level Agreement (SLA) countdown. If an officer doesn't resolve a water leak in 48 hours, the system automatically escalates it to their supervisor. No manual intervention needed.
about.techDesc: NyayaSetu is built on a modern, robust tech stack designed for speed and reliability:
about.disclaimer: Disclaimer: NyayaSetu is a civic tech prototype developed to demonstrate how modern technology can improve municipal services. It is not an official portal of the Government of NCT of Delhi or the Municipal Corporation of Delhi (MCD).

footer.desc: Your bridge to Delhi's civic services. Discover welfare schemes you qualify for, and file civic complaints with full transparency and accountability.
footer.builtFor: Built with ❤️ for the citizens of Delhi
footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: NyayaSetu is a civic tech prototype. Not an official government portal.
